title: Review x-auto guardrail gaps for medical/AI-diagnostic posts lacking primary-source links. Focus on /Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/approval_guard.py, post_rules.py, scheduler.py, and related tests. Need: (1) identify bypasses caused by note/x quote exemptions, (2) propose the minimal safe code change an...
summary_text: **Findings (ordered by severity)** 1. **Critical: primary-source guard is bypassed whenever text contains `note.com`/`x.com`/`twitter.com`.** - In [`approval_guard.py:65`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/approval_guard.py:65), `can_approve()` returns early for `_is_thumbnail_exempt`, so claim/source checks at [`approval_guard.py:86`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/approval_guard.py:86) never run. - `_is_thumbnail_exempt` currently matches all note/X/Twitter links ([`approval_guard.py:25`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/approval_guard.py:25)). - Reproduced: long medical-claim text + `note.com` or `x.com` URL returns `True, []` even with missing/non-primary `source_url`. 2. **High: scheduler has no independent primary-source quality check; it depends on `can_approve()`.** - Quarantine path uses `can_approve()` at [`scheduler.py:426`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scheduler.py:426). If `can_approve()` is bypassed, quarantine misses it. - `_validate_pre_post()` only checks citation presence (`reply_url` or `source_url`) at [`scheduler.py:406`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scheduler.py:406), not whether source is primary. 3. **Test coverage gap encodes exemption but not claim+exemption collision.** - Exemption tests exist: [`test_approval_guard.py:9`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_approval_guard.py:9), [`test_approval_guard.py:16`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_approval_guard.py:16). - Missing: tests where medical/research claim language coexists with note/X URL exemptions. --- **Minimal safe code change (no file edits performed)** Change only `can_approve()` in [`approval_guard.py`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/approval_guard.py): 1. Run primary-source claim checks (`_needs_primary_source` / `has_research_claim_language`) **before** the thumbnail-exemption early return. 2. Keep thumbnail/image checks exempted for note/X/Twitter posts as-is. This is the smallest fix that closes the bypass without changing current thumbnail policy. --- **Exact tests to add** In [`tests/test_approval_guard.py`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_approval_guard.py): 1. `test_note_link_quant_claim_requires_primary_source_even_when_thumbnail_exempt` - Post text includes quantitative/medical claim + `note.com` URL, no `source_url`. - Assert blocked with `quantitative/medical-effect claim requires primary source_url`. 2. `test_x_link_quant_claim_requires_primary_source_even_when_thumbnail_exempt` - Post text includes quantitative/medical claim + `x.com/.../status/...`, no `source_url`. - Assert blocked with same quantitative-primary-source blocker. 3. `test_x_link_research_claim_blocks_note_source_even_when_thumbnail_exempt` - Research-claim wording + `x.com` URL in text + `source_url=note.com`. - Assert blocked with `research/evidence claim source_url must not be x.com/twitter.com/note.com`. 4. `test_x_link_claim_with_primary_source_still_passes_thumbnail_exempt_path` - Claim wording + `x.com` URL in text + primary `source_url` (e.g., `nejm.org`). - Assert allowed (to prevent over-tightening). In [`tests/test_scheduler_gate1.py`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_scheduler_gate1.py): 5. `test_quarantine_invalid_approved_posts_demotes_exempt_link_claim_missing_primary_source` - Approved/scheduled post with claim language + `x.com` or `note.com` in text, no/invalid `source_url`. - Call `_quarantine_invalid_approved_posts`, assert `changed == 1`, status becomes `failed`, and `failure_reason` contains primary-source blocker. These tests specifically lock the note/X-quote bypass you called out.
